ring_chart.instruction: Use react-native-svg Circle elements. Set strokeWidth to 8-12. Use strokeDasharray and strokeDashoffset to animate completion. Apply drop shadows for glow. Focus rings colors: Social (#00D9FF), Fitness (#00FF88), Appearance (#FF3366), Mindset (#9D4CDD).

hero_emblem.instruction: Build a view combining Expo vector icon 'shield' or 'diamond' overlaid on a pulsating glowing circle using Reanimated. Optional: layer the provided abstract image underneath.

Home.layout: Scrollable dark canvas with subtle starfield background (ImageBackground). Top section: Centered glowing shield/crystal emblem, 'Level X' bold text below, and a horizontal XP progress bar (Amber #FFB800) underneath. Middle section: 4 Daily completion rings arranged in a 2x2 grid or single circular overlapping rings (Apple Watch style) for Social, Fitness, Appearance, Mindset. Bottom section: Current streak counter and today's completed tasks stats.

Tasks.layout: List view. Header with Date and 'Daily Quests'. Categorized sections: Morning, Afternoon, Evening. Each task is a Glass Card with a circular checkbox. When checked, play a tick animation and show a '+XP' floater. Floating Action Button (FAB) at bottom right to add custom tasks. Must use testIDs for all buttons and task items.

Goals.layout: Grid of focus areas (Social, Fitness, etc.). Tapping an area expands to show long-term goals. Each goal has a horizontal progress bar. Design: sleek cards with neon top borders corresponding to the category color.

Progress.layout: Data-heavy dashboard. Weekly/monthly XP charts using react-native-svg line charts or bar charts with glowing accents. Confidence metric dashboard. Timeline list of level-up history.

Achievements.layout: Grid of badges. Unlocked badges are vibrant, glowing, full opacity. Locked badges are grayscale, 0.3 opacity, flat. Badges can use @expo/vector-icons inside stylized hexagonal or circular views.

Profile.layout: Avatar section with level ring around it. Lifetime stats (total XP, highest streak). Settings list with toggles.

FocusMode.layout: Full-screen distraction-free mode. Massive countdown timer in the center. Requires a physical action (like tracking 10 taps quickly, or just answering a prompt) to 'unlock' if trying to exit early.

AddTaskModal.layout: Slide-up modal with Glass Card styling. Input fields for Task Name, Time category (Morning/Afternoon/Evening), Focus Area dropdown, and Add button. Must have distinct testIDs.

hero_emblem.description: 3D cube with glowing edges, used as an abstract hero crystal if needed.

starfield_background.description: Intricate view of galaxy and starscape in dark cosmos, use at low opacity (10-20%) as global app background layer.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'react-native-svg' and 'react-native-reanimated' (ensure babel plugin is configured) as they are critical for the glowing rings and progress bars.
Do not use Tailwind or Shadcn as this is a React Native app. Use standard React Native StyleSheet API.
Strictly follow the color palette. Background must be deep midnight (#05070D).
Cards must use the 'glass_card' design specs: dark transparent background with a subtle border and shadow.
Implement the 'testID' attribute on all interactive elements (Tasks, Buttons, Tabs, Inputs) for end-to-end testing.
For the daily completion rings, implement Apple Watch style concentric rings or a 2x2 grid of single rings using 'react-native-svg' Circle elements.
Ensure 'FocusMode' hides standard navigation and locks the user in until timer completes or challenge is done.
